arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd & Chelsea make Gavi contact; Arsenal rival Liverpool for Zubimendi
arts.sum: Arsenal want to sign a new midfielder to replace Thomas Partey in 2025 and are ready to move for Liverpool target Martin Zubimendi of Real Sociedad. With Virgil van Dijk's future up in the air, Liverpool have drawn up a four-man shortlist of replacements which includes Juventus' Gleison Bremer, Sporting CP's Goncalo Inacio, Sevilla's Loic Bade and Crystal Palace's Marc Guehi .

arts.ttl: The best ways to watch & follow Palace v Manchester United LIVE
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are in action against Manchester United at Selhurst Park this Saturday (21st September, 17:30 BST) – and there are plenty of ways you can watch and follow the action LIVE!

arts.ttl: Manchester United make new decision on Old Trafford rebuild
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe wants Man United's new intended stadium to be one of the biggest in Europe and plans are set to be submitted before the end of the year.

arts.ttl: OTD: When Palace won away… at Selhurst Park (1997)
arts.sum: Selhurst Park celebrates its 100th anniversary this year – and within its century-old charm lies a plethora of curious, charismatic anecdotes. Take on this day 27 years ago, for example, when Crystal Palace won their first-ever Premier League game when playing as the away team at Selhurst Park.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Manchester United predictions: As Eze as that
arts.sum: Manchester United have dismal memories of their last visit to Selhurst Park and Aaron Ashley is siding with Crystal Palace hotshot Eberechi Eze to find the net against the Red Devils on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Chelsea battle for 17-year-old Sporting CP wonderkid
arts.sum: Man Utd's co-owners Ineos, who are heading football operations at the club, are looking to bring in fresh young talent and move away from playing extortionate amounts for their targets. Chelsea, Manchester United and Tottenham are looking at the possibility of signing the Sporting CP winger Geovany Quenda, according to reports.

Manchester United have completed the signings of Samuel Lusale and James Overy in what has been described as an “exciting” double deal for the academy. United are also expecting to complete a deal to sign Chido Obi-Martin from Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Premier League star on Erik ten Hag radar?
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Erik ten Hag is reportedly interested in signing a player that has already starred against the Red Devils this season.

arts.ttl: Alex Ferguson gives sweet nod to late wife Cathy as he reveals what he misses most about football
arts.sum: Alex Ferguson gave a sweet nod to his late wife Cathy as he revealed what he misses most about football.

arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU name the Manchester United team from Louis van Gaal's first game in charge in 2014?
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!
